targets.rawSql: SELECT hostname, display_name, location, agent_status, cpu_percent, ram_percent, dns_service_name, dns_service_active, last_seen AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS last_seen FROM v_agent_current_status ORDER BY agent_status, hostname

options.css: * { font-family: 'Inter','Segoe UI',sans-serif; box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; } @keyframes pulse-green{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(0,200,81,.4)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(0,200,81,0)}} @keyframes pulse-red{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(244,67,54,.4)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(244,67,54,0)}} @keyframes pulse-yellow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(255,187,51,.4)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(255,187,51,0)}} @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS ts, hostname, domain, error_code, attempts FROM dns_checks WHERE success = FALSE AND ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT domain, ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric,1) AS avg_ms, ROUND(MAX(latency_ms)::numeric,1) AS max_ms, COUNT(*) AS checks, SUM(CASE WHEN success THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS failures FROM dns_checks WHERE ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY domain ORDER BY avg_ms DESC NULLS LAST
SELECT ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS ts, hostname, alert_type, severity, message, metric_value FROM alerts_log WHERE resolved_at IS NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT issued_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS issued_at, executed_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' AS executed_at, hostname, command, issued_by, status, result FROM agent_commands ORDER BY issued_at DESC LIMIT 20
